title: Phase 20.6 Autonomous Loop Proof — Final

days_evaluated.phase19_rules_detail: Phase 19 13-step daily loop prompt loaded. Phase 19.2 normalization (raw API only) was in effect.
days_evaluated.gsc_api_staleness_reason: Cron used cached/stale GSC data from June 9. Fresh pull on Jun 11 shows impressions dropped 40% (242 vs 499).
days_evaluated.deploy_changes: 1 CTR fix (pay-off-debt-or-invest) + geo meta fix + 3 tool variant title improvements (mortgage, compound, investment-return)
days_evaluated.daily_lock_detail: phase19-daily-lock.json overwritten by Jun 11 run. Only one lock entry preserved. work_status/telegram_status separated for Jun 11 but Jun 10 record lost.
days_evaluated.violation_detail: 3 tool variant title improvements applied to ~150+ thin duplicate pages (mortgage, compound, investment-return)—violates Phase 20 cannibalization review which held tool/scenario optimization pending Auditor+Technical Guardian approval.

days_evaluated.phase19_rules_detail: Phase 19 13-step daily loop prompt loaded. Phase 19.2 normalization (raw API only) acknowledged but corrected estimate still saved to files.
days_evaluated.gsc_api_pull_actual_range: 2026-05-31 to 2026-06-07 (STALE — 4+ days old at time of use)
days_evaluated.gsc_api_staleness_reason: Used SAME stale baseline as Jun 10 and Jun 9. Fresh pull on Jun 11 gives 242 impressions (Jun 5-11), demonstrating ~300% overstatement of current traffic.
days_evaluated.deploy_changes: 5 CTR template fixes on tool variants (loan, mortgage, investment, compound) + 12 internal links
days_evaluated.violation_detail: All 5 CTR template fixes targeted thin tool variant templates (~150+ pages). These are the exact pages under Phase 20 cannibalization review. Violates Phase 19.2 policy (raw API only KPIs — corrected ~716 estimate still saved).

autonomy_explanation: Cron started automatically both days without manual prompting. Work executed before Telegram. Deploys passed. HOWEVER: (1) GSC data was stale both days — same 499-impression baseline from June 9 reused, while fresh pull shows impressions dropped to 242 (Jun 5-11 range). (2) Both days applied CTR/title/meta improvements to thin tool variant templates, violating Phase 20 cannibalization review policy. (3) June 10 daily lock record was overwritten by June 11. (4) Corrected ~716 estimate persisted in gsc-live-data-corrected.json despite Phase 19.2 normalization policy.
